message:
Add rich error context to E2E test command failures

Replace .assert().success() and bare assert!(status.success()) with
structured E2eError/E2eErrorContext diagnostics across three test files:
e2e_multi_connector.rs (19 assertions), e2e_index_tui.rs (2), and
e2e_install_easy.rs (1). Each failure now logs exit code, stdout/stderr
tails via tracker.fail() before panicking.

Closes br-3ej4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
